## [Change]

- Split generated MySQL support-matrix topology rows by version-specific OS package rules so MySQL 9.7.0 is shown separately from earlier supported version families.
- Move MySQL Router and Router HA configuration summaries after VIP network-interface validation, and avoid duplicate basic Router validation during HA prechecks.

## [Fix]

- Make MySQL uninstall entry playbooks fail fast across the whole host group when MySQL 9.7 is requested on RHEL 7 family hosts, avoiding partial uninstall execution.
- Clarify the MySQL 9.7 RHEL 7 family precheck error so uninstall users pass the version that was actually deployed.
